chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1131 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case (Priority) 1.For hearing of CMA 4714/23 2.For hearing of main case 22-05-2025 Mr. Mehfooz Ahmed Awan, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Shahriyar I. Awan, Assistant A.G. **** Counsel for the petitioners, under instructions, does not press instant petition and submits that the petitioners will file petition afresh. Accordingly, this petition along with listed application is dismissed as not pressed. However, the petitioners may file a fresh petition, if so advised, subject to all legal exceptions. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
